name: iDecide - Backoffice API for Zapier
description:
The iDecide Backoffice API provides the functionality required by the iDecide Zapier app. The iDecide Zapier app allows a user to access back-office specific functionality such as creating iDecide URLs, registering for REST hook callbacks, etc.

Authorization is performed by providing an "access token" (obtained by calling /user/authenticate) to each operation in the 'Authorization' header (with a "Bearer " prefix).
